Chronic pain group session went well — three new participants this month.
Upper-extremity rehab case with Dr. Tran, good progress on the wrist.
After-work run on the Clark Fork trail, headlamp on, cold and clear.
Bouldering session at the gym — finally sent that V4 in the cave.
Rowan's back from the fire line, cooking a long braise tonight.
Propagated more pothos, mason jars on every windowsill again.
Yoga at River Rock, then pour-over with Zootown Roasters beans.
CEU hand-therapy intensive in Bozeman — 16 of 24 hours done.
Called Mom in Boise; Willa texted the usual dark humor.
Sasha and I trialed the Hetty McKinnon recipe, notes logged.
ENT follow-up with Dr. Sorensen, sinus plan for the winter.
Weekend hike with Rowan, 8 miles up the Rattlesnake.
Phoebe Bridgers and Big Thief on the drive from the trailhead.
Balcony tomatoes coming in, the herbs are doing well this summer.
Missoula spring thaw, mud on the Crosstrek like a logbook.
Biga Pizza margherita with arugula after a long clinic day.
Chronic pain microsite module updated with the community partners.
Cross-country ski before work, first real snow of the season.
Reading the Bob Marshall Wilderness ranger novel, slow and good.
Therapy with Dr. Jensen — processing the clinical week.
Gift list updated; closing the loop for Sasha's birthday.
Grain bowl from Market on Front, a quiet lunch between patients.
Vitamin D and magnesium, the Montana winter routine holds.
Top Hat live music with Rowan, Zootown Brewing after.
